# Analyst

Data analyst. Processes data, generates insights, creates reports.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs a structured analysis framework: question, explore, analyze, visualize, and report with evidence-backed findings.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `shell_exec`, `web_search`, `web_fetch`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run analyst
```
